title: Shinji Ikari Raising Project Any walkthroughs around
display_title: Shinji Ikari Raising Project Any walkthroughs around
wikitext:
[]: Shinji Ikari Raising Project : Any walkthroughs around?             Quote Post by Great Genius Shinji-Sama » Tue Aug 11, 2009 5:25 pm Hey can someone please tell me where I could find a fan translated copy of SIRP for my pc? I'm sorry if this doesnt go here or something. Its been too long since I've been on here and im not trying to break rules or nothing. Or if there are any some walkthrough FAQ threads for it as well. Thanks.

[]:             Quote Post by Mr. Tines » Tue Aug 11, 2009 5:35 pm No downloads here. I don't know whether there are any walkthroughs for the game. I'll leave the thread around for those.

[]:             Quote Post by Kubania » Thu Aug 13, 2009 12:41 am [url]http://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Shinji_Ikari_Raising_Project[/url] This is the only info I've found. I've been playing it too, but since I neither speak, nor read Japanese... I just sorta fumbled my way through it.

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Fri Aug 14, 2009 3:38 pm I know some Japanese and I've played the PS2 port of the Ayanami and Asuka Raising Project so that helps (though I prefer the Ayanami and Asuka one if only for the fact that we get stills from the series that look like the anime instead of the images in the Shinji game...but it's still fun). What's frustrating about the game is how easily the Angels can destroy buildings of the stores Shinji and the others go to. From what I noticed, defending doesn't seem to help much to protect places, either.
